title: hieracium piloselloides var. epilosum
intro: Hieracium piloselloides var. epilosum, commonly known as false hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Hieracium piloselloides var. epilosum is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
